title: T-149 — PARITY: Rules/Reference Data screens Playwright + axe parity vs admin-screens.jsx:152-210,216-344,475-535 — 02-settings-d-ui
prompt:
# T-149 — Rules/Reference Data screens browser parity

PRD: docs/prd/02-Settings-PRD.md
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:152-210,216-344,475-535 + data-screens.jsx:151-187 + rules-data.jsx
Parent tasks: T-063, T-064, T-067, T-073, T-077, T-078, T-096, T-108, T-114, T-115

## Goal
Playwright screenshot parity + axe-violations check for all 10 screens/modals in this group against the settings prototype. 0 critical/serious axe violations on each screen.

## Screens in scope
Rules Registry, Rule Detail, Reference Data, Units/UoM, MfgOps List, MfgOps Edit, Ref CSV Import Wizard, Rule Version Diff, Reference Audit Trail, MfgOps Audit Trail

## Implementation contract
- Playwright spec at apps/web/e2e/settings/d-ui-parity.spec.ts
- Seeds appropriate fixture data for each screen
- Visits each screen/modal URL, captures full-page screenshot vs prototype region
- Runs axe-core on each view; asserts 0 critical and 0 serious violations
- Attaches traces/screenshots per _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Files in scope
- apps/web/e2e/settings/d-ui-parity.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/settings/fixtures/d-ui-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Playwright runs the parity spec for each screen, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:152-210,216-344,475-535 + data-screens.jsx:151-187 + rules-data.jsx, then screenshots match within tolerance per _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md
2. Given each screen is mounted, when axe-core runs, then 0 critical and 0 serious violations
3. Closeout attaches Playwright traces/screenshots OR documents blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify implementation code
- Do not relax axe threshold
- Do not run against shared/staging DB
